mapper.select: SELECT b.`id`, b.`table`, b.`fields`, b.`field_msg`, a.`role` FROM `sys_data_field` a JOIN `sys_field` b ON b.`id` = a.`field_id` WHERE a.`data_id` = #{id}
SELECT a.id, a.`name`, a.`type`, b.label AS 'types' FROM `sys_data` a LEFT JOIN `sys_dict` b ON b.`value` = a.`type` AND b.`type` = 'sys_data_type' AND b.`del_flag` = 0 WHERE a.del_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `sys_data` ( `name`, `type`, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{type}, #{createUser}, NOW(), #{createUser}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT a.`id`, a.`table`, a.`fields`, a.`field_msg` FROM `sys_field` a WHERE a.`type` = #{type}
